title: DigiFlex Performance CANopen Communication Manual
covers: Complete CANopen communication reference for DigiFlex Performance servo drives. Covers NMT state machine, SDO/PDO messaging, COB-ID configuration, object dictionary entries, and CiA 402 drive profile including controlword/statusword, homing modes, and interpolated position mode. Includes scaling factors and current limiting appendices.

key_sections.name: CANopen Communication Protocol (NMT, SDO, PDO, SYNC, Emergency)
Appendix A - Scaling Factors and Current Limiting

when_to_use: Search when a user has a DigiFlex drive with CANopen protocol and needs help with CANopen objects, PDO mapping, NMT states, or drive parameters.

title: DigiFlex Performance EtherCAT Communication Manual
covers: Complete EtherCAT communication reference for DigiFlex Performance servo drives. Covers CoE (CANopen over EtherCAT), SDO/PDO messaging, distributed clocks, object dictionary entries, and CiA 402 drive profile. Includes drive initialization parameters, digital I/O configuration, motion engine states, and fault codes.

key_sections.name: EtherCAT Communication Protocol (SDO, PDO, DC, Sync)
Appendix A - Scaling Factors and Current Limiting

when_to_use: Search when a user has a DigiFlex drive with EtherCAT protocol and needs help with EtherCAT objects, PDO mapping, distributed clocks, or drive parameters.

title: FlexPro Ethernet/IP Communication Manual
covers: Complete Ethernet/IP communication reference for FlexPro servo drives. Covers CIP protocol, implicit/explicit messaging, assembly instances, command dictionary with instance-based addressing, and drive profile. Includes IP configuration, connection parameters, and Add-On Instruction support for Rockwell PLCs.

key_sections.name: Appendix A - Scaling Factors and Current Limiting

when_to_use: Search when a user has a FlexPro IPM drive using Ethernet/IP and needs help with CIP messaging, assembly configuration, or drive parameters.

title: DigiFlex Performance Ethernet Communication Manual
covers: Ethernet/IP communication reference for DigiFlex Performance panel mount drives. Covers serial communication protocol with Ethernet transport, command dictionary with hex index addressing, and drive configuration parameters. Includes scaling factors and current limiting appendices.

key_sections.name: Appendix A - Scaling Factors and Current Limiting

when_to_use: Search when a user has a DigiFlex panel mount drive with Ethernet/IP and needs help with command dictionary entries or serial protocol over Ethernet.

title: FlexPro CANopen Communication Manual
covers: Complete CANopen communication reference for FlexPro servo drives. Covers NMT state machine, SDO/PDO messaging, COB-ID configuration, object dictionary entries, and CiA 402 drive profile. Largest comm manual with extended object dictionary covering FlexPro-specific features including advanced current loop parameters and enhanced I/O.

key_sections.name: CANopen Communication Protocol (NMT, SDO, PDO, SYNC, Emergency)
Appendix A - Scaling Factors and Current Limiting

when_to_use: Search when a user has a FlexPro CM drive using CANopen protocol and needs help with CANopen objects, PDO mapping, or FlexPro-specific parameters.

title: FlexPro EtherCAT Communication Manual
covers: Complete EtherCAT communication reference for FlexPro servo drives. Covers CoE (CANopen over EtherCAT), SDO/PDO messaging, distributed clocks, object dictionary entries, and CiA 402 drive profile. Includes FlexPro-specific parameters, charge-based current limiting, and ESI file information.

key_sections.name: Appendix A - Scaling Factors and Current Limiting

when_to_use: Search when a user has a FlexPro EM drive using EtherCAT protocol and needs help with EtherCAT objects, PDO mapping, distributed clocks, or FlexPro-specific parameters.

title: FlexPro Serial (RS485/RS232) Communication Manual
covers: Complete serial communication reference for FlexPro servo drives. Covers RS485/RS232 binary protocol with SOF/address/data/CRC framing, host command structure, object dictionary with hex index addressing, and PVT (position-velocity-time) streaming. Includes scaling factors and current limiting appendices.

key_sections.name: Appendix A - Scaling Factors and Current Limiting

when_to_use: Search when a user has a FlexPro RM drive using RS485 or RS232 serial protocol and needs help with serial commands, packet framing, or drive parameters.

title: DigiFlex Performance Modbus RTU Communication Manual
covers: Modbus RTU communication reference for DigiFlex Performance servo drives with RS485 Modbus interface. Covers Modbus function codes, register mapping, and drive parameter access via Modbus protocol. Smaller manual focused specifically on the Modbus register interface.
when_to_use: Search when a user has a DigiFlex RA drive using Modbus RTU protocol and needs help with Modbus registers, function codes, or drive parameter access.

title: DigiFlex Performance POWERLINK Communication Manual
covers: Complete POWERLINK (Ethernet POWERLINK) communication reference for DigiFlex Performance servo drives. Covers POWERLINK protocol, managing node configuration, object dictionary entries, PDO mapping, and CiA 402 drive profile. Includes scaling factors and current limiting appendices.

key_sections.name: Appendix A - Scaling Factors and Current Limiting

when_to_use: Search when a user has a DigiFlex drive with POWERLINK protocol and needs help with POWERLINK objects, PDO mapping, or drive parameters.

title: DigiFlex Performance RS485/RS232 Communication Manual
covers: Complete serial communication reference for DigiFlex Performance servo drives. covers: Tutorial for setting up a two-axis EtherCAT fieldbus project on MACC controller using Click&Move, including target properties and multi-program execution.
when_to_use: Search when a user needs to set up EtherCAT drives on a MACC controller with Click&Move.

title: AN-058: Inrush Current Protection on AMC Drives
covers: Technical guide on inrush current protection methods used in AMC drives, including NTC thermistors, current limiting status, and dangers of inrush current with different supply types.
when_to_use: Search when a user has questions about inrush current protection, NTC thermistors, or current limiting at power-on.

title: AN-059: High-Speed Capture (Registration, Conveyors)
covers: Guide for using high-speed capture functionality including capture signals, PWM/direction inputs, and conveyor positioning applications.
when_to_use: Search when a user needs to configure high-speed position capture or registration for conveyor applications.

title: AN-060: ACE FlexPro Serial Communication Programming
covers: Programming guide for FlexPro drives via serial protocol using ACE, covering index offsets, scaling factors, CRC calculation, and command/status register mapping.
when_to_use: Search when a user needs to program FlexPro drives via serial RS485 protocol using ACE software.

title: AN-061: Click&Move EtherCAT Runtime Optimization
covers: Guide for optimizing Click&Move runtime performance with EtherCAT, including CPU affinity configuration, EfChannel property files, and runtime preparations.
when_to_use: Search when a user needs to optimize Click&Move EtherCAT runtime performance.

title: AN-062: Home to Hard Stop Procedure
covers: Guide for configuring and executing a home-to-hard-stop routine, covering home position definition, detection configuration, network commands, and motion engine sequencing.
when_to_use: Search when a user needs to configure a homing routine that homes to a mechanical hard stop.

title: AxCent Large Size Retrofit Guide
covers: Retrofit guide for replacing older large-size analog drives with AxCent panel mount drives (AB30A200AC, AB50A200 series). Includes replacement charts, PE connection terminal locations, and feedback connector pinout cross-references.
when_to_use: Search when a user needs to retrofit or replace an older large analog drive with an AxCent drive.

title: AxCent Small Size Retrofit Guide
covers: Retrofit guide for replacing older small-size analog drives with AxCent panel mount drives (AB20A200 series). Includes replacement charts, DIP switch configuration, and tuning DIP switch settings.
when_to_use: Search when a user needs to retrofit or replace an older small analog drive with an AxCent drive.

title: FlexPro Ethernet/IP Add-On Instruction (AOI) Guide
covers: Guide for using FlexPro Ethernet/IP Add-On Instructions (AOI) with Rockwell/Allen-Bradley PLCs, including SINT[14] read/write message configuration and import procedures.
when_to_use: Search when a user needs to integrate FlexPro Ethernet/IP drives with Allen-Bradley PLCs using Add-On Instructions.

title: FlexPro Power Source Wiring Guide
covers: Wiring guide for FlexPro drives covering source configurations for battery, AC rectified, and switching power supplies. Includes external capacitance recommendations and dual battery wiring diagrams.
when_to_use: Search when a user needs power supply wiring guidance or external capacitance values for FlexPro drives.

title: AB30A200AC External Heat Sink Installation Instructions
covers: Instructions for installing an external heat sink on the AB30A200AC drive, with warranty modification warnings.

title: AMC Product Identification Label Guide

title: White Paper: Visual Programming of Logic, Motion, and Robotics
